active_blocker_reinforced.name: Route_B_Legacy_residual_artifact_subgroups
active_blocker_reinforced.details: Legacy corrective lane materially improved the artifact surface. Remaining residuals are now narrow and typed: one hard collapse/layout case, one likely genre-mismatch case, and a very small methods/results boundary-noise subgroup.

legacy_correction_state.decision: Freeze current corrective code state; do not continue broad patching in this lane.

completed_lanes_append: Second-stage legacy methods-recovery patch materially improved the Route_B OCR artifact surface
Boundary-quality audit completed and showed the residual methods subgroup is now small and heterogeneous
Legacy corrective lane frozen at a disciplined stopping point for export regeneration

authoritative_next_execution_order: Regenerate export package and flat analyst file from the corrected Route_B metrics and Phase 6 outputs
Review regenerated route summaries, epoch metrics, and flat analyst file headers
Prepare clean checkpointed state for later commit/push review
Keep residual hard-collapse and genre-mismatch cases documented as bounded limitations
